rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEAN MILDRED NELSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/10/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) If a general pecuniary devise is not distributed within one year after the testator's death, the devise bears interest (7%) thereafter. [Probate Code Section 12003 and 12001.] (2) When the petition seeks a non-pro rata distribution, it must show the computation on which the proposed distribution is based. Consents of interested beneficiaries must be filed. [LRSF 14.35 I.a.ii.] Did the other two residuary beneficiaries consent to Tom Biesty receiving the 2017 Ford Edge without any equalizing amounts to them? (3) What happened to the 2004 Nissan Titan truck bequeathed to Malia Teaupa? (4) Refunds for amounts disbursed during administration or "miscellaneous" receipts are not includable in the fee base. Please provide a revised proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues (an amendment to the petition) to the assigned examiner by 11/24/25. Notice of the amendment must be served after it is e-filed. [CRC 7.53(a).] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Notice of Proposed Action is not required when securities are sold on an established stock or bond exchange. [Probate Code Section 10537(b)(2).] A petitioner does not need to give notice to himself and his attorney. [Probate Code Section 1201.])

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF PAUL SEGAL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The judicial officer is to review and determine whether to take this petition off calendar, as nothing has been filed to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 06/10/2025), and whether to allow the conservator to file a new petition to terminate this conservatorship with a first AND FINAL account in light of the conservatee's death: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No GC-020 form (notice of hearing with proof of service) is on file. 3) No proof of payment of assessment fee is on file for the initial court investigation. 4) No proof of payment of assessment fee is on file for the review court investigation. 5) Please explain the nature or purpose of the "Hartford" ($74.80) on 12/15/2023 & 01/16/2024 listed on the schedule of disbursements. 6) Please provide a statement of compliance with CRC 7.1059(b)(17) before the conservator sold the conservatee's car. 7) Did the conservator appraise the conservatee's car before the sale? No appraisal was attached to the inventory and appraisal. 8) Is the conservatee's estate the designated beneficiary of his IRA? 9) The conservatee's IRA did not accrue any interest during this account period. Please explain why the IRA funds were not transferred to an interest-bearing account. 10) A statement of the conservatee's IRA account covering 11/29/2023 is not on file. 11) A statement of the conservatee's Bank of America account covering 11/29/2023 is not on file. 12) A statement of the conservatee's Chase accounts covering 11/29/2023 is not on file. Note: Those missing statements must be accompanied by an additional declaration re retention of the original statements required by LRSF 14.59(A) & CRC 2.257. 13) Please describe the conservator's efforts made, if any, to mitigate damages before entry of default money judgment against the conservatee in the unlawful detainer action. 14) Does the conservator intend to satisfy in full or in part the outstanding money judgment against the conservatee entered in the unlawful detainer action, or let the judgment remain unsatisfied with interest continuing to accrue at the legal rate? PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARLOS NELSON MONTOYA JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Granted per written order. A "declaration re Examiner Notes" is not an appropriate pleading. Issues raised by an examiner are not part of the record. A petition is either SUPPLEMENTED to provide additional information or AMENDED to provide materially different information. [CRC 7.3.] A court-appointed fiduciary must supplement or amend her own pleadings, not her attorney. [Probate Code Section 1023 and CRC 7.103(c).]
